notes.platform_vs_tenant: E13b endpoints live on platform-api (port 5101), NOT the tenant ERP api (port 5100). Auth is completely separate.

PLATFORM_ADMIN.note: TOTP code must be generated at runtime from the secret. Use a TOTP library (e.g. otplib) to generate valid 6-digit codes.

PLATFORM_VIEWER.note: This user is NOT seeded by default. Must be created via POST /admin/users in the test setup phase.

test_execution_order: Phase 0: Health check — verify API is running
Phase 1: Auth — login as PLATFORM_ADMIN to get {{ADMIN_TOKEN}}
Phase 2: Setup — create PLATFORM_VIEWER user via POST /admin/users, then login as viewer to get {{VIEWER_TOKEN}}
Phase 3: Read endpoints (list/detail) — tenants, plans, users, billing, AI quota
Phase 4: AI Usage reads — summary, per-tenant usage, by-feature, alerts list, providers list, BYOK list
Phase 5: AI Usage writes — spike-detection, acknowledge alert, update provider key, toggle provider
Phase 6: AI Usage BYOK writes — add BYOK (expect 403 for non-Enterprise), toggle, delete
Phase 7: AI Usage export — CSV export with various filters
Phase 8: Impersonation — start session, get active session, list sessions, session detail, end session
Phase 9: Support search — search by name, code, id, email, general
Phase 10: Audit log reads — list with filters, detail, cursor pagination
Phase 11: Audit log export — CSV export with various filters
Phase 12: RBAC enforcement — re-run all write endpoints as PLATFORM_VIEWER to confirm 403
Phase 13: Unauthenticated — spot-check endpoints without Authorization header to confirm 401
